title: senna spinescens var. schultesiana
intro: Senna spinescens var. schultesiana, also known as schultesiana senna or senna, is a variety of the senna plant, a shrub-like plant that belongs to the legume family and is native to tropical regions of the Americas. The plant has been used for centuries for its medicinal properties, which include being a natural laxative and having anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of senna include relieving constipation, reducing fever, and treating digestive issues, as well as its potential to lower cholesterol levels and reduce blood pressure. The plant is often used to prepare herbal teas, tinctures, and capsules, which are commonly consumed to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
